name: Wireless Earbuds Demo
title: SoundPeak AirBass X2 Wireless Earbuds
intended_use_case: Daily music, online meetings, commuting, and student use.
description: Compact wireless earbuds positioned for daily listening and calls. The page claims better microphone quality and longer battery life, but the claim is not supported with test proof.
target_audience: Students and young professionals who need affordable earbuds for music and calls.
value_proposition: Mid-range wireless earbuds for daily use with a claimed stronger microphone experience.
warranty_or_return_policy: Warranty is mentioned but duration and return conditions are unclear.
shipping_info: Ships across Türkiye; delivery time and shipping fee are not clearly stated.
reviews_or_social_proof: No public reviews yet. Competitor appears to have more visible social proof.
image_notes: Needs charging case closeups, in-ear scale photos, and a microphone test proof asset.

competitor_strengths: Battery life is stated more clearly
competitor_context.our_differentiator: Claimed better microphone and longer battery life

known_limitations: Battery life is not specified clearly

name: Running Shoes Demo
title: Runora FlexStep 3 Running Shoes
intended_use_case: Beginner road running, walking, light gym sessions, and daily active use.
description: Lightweight running shoes for daily movement. The page mentions comfort but does not explain sizing, fit, or material enough for confident purchase.
target_audience: Beginner runners and active commuters who want one comfortable daily shoe.
value_proposition: Comfortable daily running shoes with practical styling for everyday activity.
warranty_or_return_policy: Return and exchange policy is vague and does not explain worn-item conditions.
shipping_info: Standard shipping is planned; delivery window and fee need clearer placement.
reviews_or_social_proof: No public buyer photos or fit feedback yet.
image_notes: Needs on-foot images, sole detail, material closeups, and size reference photos.

competitor_context.our_differentiator: Cleaner everyday style and claimed flexible sole comfort

name: Coffee Machine Demo
title: Brewora CompactBar Pro Coffee Machine
intended_use_case: Small kitchens, home office coffee breaks, and first-time espresso-style coffee users.
description: Compact coffee machine for small kitchens. The page highlights premium design but does not yet provide enough technical, maintenance, or warranty detail.
target_audience: Home coffee buyers who want a compact machine without a large countertop setup.
value_proposition: A compact coffee setup for small kitchens with a premium-looking design.
warranty_or_return_policy: Warranty is mentioned but duration, service process, and return conditions are unclear.
shipping_info: Shipping is available across Türkiye; delivery timing needs clearer placement.
reviews_or_social_proof: No public customer reviews yet; product photos are still being prepared.
image_notes: Needs water tank view, cup clearance, cleaning process, dimensions, and countertop scale image.

competitor_context.our_differentiator: Premium compact design for small kitchens

known_limitations: Cleaning and maintenance details are missing
Premium price is not fully justified

name: Digital Service Demo
title: PixelNest Studio Starter Business Website Package
intended_use_case: Small businesses preparing a first website before ads, outreach, or marketplace listings.
description: A starter website package for small businesses. The page promises a professional site but does not clearly define scope, delivery timeline, revisions, or support.
target_audience: Small business owners who need a simple launch-ready website.
value_proposition: A focused starter website package without hiring a full agency.
warranty_or_return_policy: Revision and refund terms are not clearly explained.
shipping_info: Digital delivery; timeline is described generally but not committed clearly.
reviews_or_social_proof: Portfolio examples are referenced but not linked or shown.
image_notes: Needs package scope preview, portfolio screenshots, and a deliverables checklist.

competitor_context.our_differentiator: More tailored starter strategy and cleaner launch messaging

name: Online Course Demo
title: DataPath Academy SQL Foundations for Beginners
intended_use_case: Beginners learning SQL for school projects, entry-level analytics work, or career switching.
description: Beginner SQL course for people who want practical database skills. The page explains the topic but gives only broad module names and limited proof of instructor credibility.
target_audience: Beginners who want a practical first SQL course.
value_proposition: A beginner-friendly path to core SQL skills with practical exercises.
shipping_info: Digital access after enrollment; support and lesson access terms are not clearly described.
reviews_or_social_proof: No public student outcomes or sample lesson yet.
image_notes: Needs instructor profile, module detail, sample lesson screen, and exercise preview.

competitor_context.our_differentiator: More practical exercises and beginner-friendly structure

name: Edge Case: Overpriced Pencil
